nation: Conseil de la Nation Innu Matimekush-Lac John
economic_notes: Council holds interests in commercial partnerships including Société en commandite Apuiat (12.5%), Transport Ferroviaire Tshiuetin inc. (33.33%), Tshiuetin S.E.C. (33.33%), Pétroles Naskinnuk S.E.C. (33.33%), Béton Naskinnu S.E.C. (25.5%). Public enterprise: Eshkan Construction société en commandite (60%). Royalty agreements with various companies for right-of-way and installations on territory. IOC mining company trust fund of $9.1M. 68% of revenues from federal transfer payments (ISC).
notes: Qualified audit opinion (opinion avec réserve) with multiple bases: unverifiable rental/royalty revenues, advances to public organizations showing impairment indicators not recognized ($7.07M), interests in commercial partnerships and public organizations with insufficient audit evidence, inventory not physically counted, transfer payment liabilities not fully supported, and asset retirement obligations not recorded. Significant accounting restatements in comparative year (Note 2). Financial statements are in French. Annual surplus of $9.81M includes $4.03M equity pickup from partnerships and enterprises. Segment detail noted as available in unaudited supplementary section pages 28-125. Province is Quebec (QC).
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
